task_description: Overhaul the website color palette to look more global and premium, using richer navy tones, warmer gold/amber tones inspired by the logo, and adding a platinum tertiary accent. Update both tailwind.config.ts and globals.css comprehensively.

verification.summary: Build passes successfully. No old color values (#D4AF37, #0B2E4F) remain in the two target files. No test framework configured in this project so test verification is N/A.
